1853180.name: Dezlooca Anthology - Retro Rpg: Rise of the One Winged Phoenix
1853180.description:
Classic Story Based JRPG Created by the Horrorcore Rap artist Dezlooca.

Based off the Dezlooca and C.U.K. Story line!

(CONTROLLER COMPATIBLE)

(Keyboard Compatible)

Full length over 30 hours of story! Explore 4 Different worlds In Chapter one and Help Dez, Archaic, Savage and Meeka Defeat the Arch-Daemon Malik.

In chapter 2 Dez and Archaic once again team up and seek out the Friends to Fight off the resurgence of Malik In their own city of Seattle. Help the Party Regain control of the city as the fight the new "living Objects" plagueing the city streets. 

- Tons of Cities to explore

- Tons of areas to enter and find

- Different themed worlds and Areas to discover

- Many Dungeons to explore and conquer!

- Secret Weapons, Skins and items only Few have found!

  • all new progression "Glimmer" markers

  • Bosses now have idle movements and Attack animations like players!

  • Chapter 2 changes with a 5 man party line 

  • Mid combat switch System

  • 8 party members and 2 additional option party members from chapter 1 return!

Join Ickus as he guides our heroes to save the Multiverse!!!

Welcome back to the charming styles of Old school JRPG games you used to love! Full Combat animation and more await this modernized Classic stylization!
